takeaways: Market positive today (Nifty +1.11%). Continue SIP accumulation on watchlist names near support levels.
Sector rotation: Pharma leads (+0.6% month), Realty lags (-16.5%). Consider tilting new allocation toward sectors with strong momentum.
27 watchlist stocks show accumulate signals: HEROMOTOCO, HAL, INDHOTEL, ICICIBANK, NAUKRI. Build positions in 2-3 tranches; max 6% per name.
3 watchlist stocks on wait: BSE, GODFRYPHLP, NTPC. Avoid catching falling knives — wait for trend reversal confirmation.
Macro watch: Crude at $93.63, USD/INR at 92.14. Rising crude or weakening INR can pressure IT/pharma margins short-term but often creates accumulation opportunities in exporters.
Position sizing: Max 6% in any single name. Multi-year horizon — don't chase momentum; buy quality on weakness. Tax-efficient if held > 1 year.
learning_questions: Do you follow earnings season closely? Want per-stock earnings calendar?

Would weekly portfolio review summaries be useful?
